back_translation: Therefore when we could not endure further, we therefore decided to consent to be left behind at the city of Athens alone
And we sent Timothy, our brother and fellow-worker of God in the gospel of Christ, to strengthen and encourage you concerning your faith
so that no one would be shaken because of these sufferings, for you yourselves know well that we are appointed for this matter
Because even when we were still with you, we told you in advance that we would have to face suffering, which has actually happened just as you know well
On account of this, when I myself could not endure further, I therefore sent [Timothy] to learn about your faith, lest the tempter might have tempted you, and our toil would become in vain

But just now Timothy has just returned to us from you, and brought good news to us about your faith and love, and that you still remember us favorably always, and long to see us, just as we long to see you
Brothers and sisters, on this account we have received comfort concerning you, in the midst of all our distress and tribulation, because of your faith
Because now we are therefore able to live, as long as you stand firm in the Lord
For what thanksgiving are we able to offer in return to God concerning you, and for all the joy that we have before the face of our God because of you
Both night and day we pray most earnestly, so as to see your face, and to help complete what is still lacking in your faith
May God and our Father Himself, and our Lord Jesus, direct our way straight to you
May the Lord cause you to increase and overflow with love toward one another and toward all people, just as we have toward you
in order that He may graciously strengthen your hearts, that you may be blameless in holiness, before our God and Father, at the coming of our Lord Jesus, together with all His holy ones
